text: A butterfly is an insect with large often colorful wings
original_text: A butterfly is an insect with large often colorful wings.

text: butterflies go through metamorphosis from egg to caterpillar to chrysalis to adult
original_text: Butterflies go through metamorphosis from egg to caterpillar to chrysalis to adult.

text: butterflies often feed on nectar from flowers
original_text: Butterflies often feed on nectar from flowers.

text: butterflies can help pollinate plants as they move from flower to flower
original_text: Butterflies can help pollinate plants as they move from flower to flower.

text: the meatball respects butterflies for turning goo into elegance
original_text: The meatball respects butterflies for turning goo into elegance.
